name: d3-org-chart

en.when_to_use: Use it for reporting lines, org charts, taxonomy trees, or folder trees when you need collapse/expand, zoom/pan, and focus on a node. Use sunburst-chart for proportional hierarchies and drawflow/xyflow for freely draggable flowcharts. A flat {id,parentId} array becomes a tree automatically (id/parentId are recognized by default) and must have exactly one root.
en.why_valuable: An organization tree needs tidy-tree/flextree automatic layout (avoiding overlap and creating levels), collapse/expand, smooth links, and zoom/pan; AI almost always misplaces coordinates when calculating the tree by hand.

data_in.note: Use a flat array, not a nested one; defaults are nodeId=d.id and parentNodeId=d.parentId, as verified in source. There must be exactly one root (parentId is null/''/undefined), and every other node's parentId must reference an existing id.

nodes.parentId: string | number | null -- references the parent node id; root uses null or ''
nodes.name?: string -- node content (shown by the default card template; customize with .nodeContent(d=>html))

spec.note: OrgChart creates a zoomable/pannable SVG viewport inside its container; give the container an explicit height (upstream default svgHeight=window.innerHeight-100, so this boot fixes .svgHeight(600)). svgWidth follows container width automatically; do not use vh.

when_to_use: 画汇报线/组织架构/分类树/文件夹树并要折叠、缩放平移、聚焦某节点时用它;占比层级用 sunburst-chart,自由拖拽流程图用 drawflow/xyflow。喂扁平 {id,parentId} 数组即自动成树(默认按 id/parentId 识别),恰需一个根。
why_valuable: 组织树要 tidy-tree/flextree 自动布局(避重叠、自动分层)+ 折叠展开 + 平滑连线 + zoom/pan,AI 手算树坐标基本必错位。

data_in.note: 扁平数组,非嵌套;默认 nodeId=d.id、parentNodeId=d.parentId(源码已核实)。必须恰有一个根(parentId 为 null/''/undefined),其余节点的 parentId 必须引用某个存在的 id。

nodes.parentId: string | number | null —— 引用父节点 id;根节点为 null 或 ''
nodes.name?: string —— 节点内容(默认卡片模板展示;可用 .nodeContent(d=>html) 自定义)

spec.note: OrgChart 在容器内自建可 zoom/pan 的 svg 视口;容器给显式 height(默认 svgHeight=window.innerHeight-100,故本条 boot 显式 .svgHeight(600) 固定),svgWidth 自动跟随容器宽,禁 vh。

example._why: 钉死扁平 {id,parentId},根节点 parentId 为空。

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;节点点击/展开/聚焦若需外传,由消费 AI 接 .onNodeClick(id) 原生回调并按载体处理。

carriers.widget: supported:svg 落 shadow 容器,container(element) 直传 shadow 内节点;JS 无 head 注入,body 仅在导出(<a download>)路径触碰,正常渲染不触。
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN,全部 d3 子模块经嵌套 +esm 自解析(无需先载 d3)。

isolation.evidence: 命名导出 OrgChart(+esm: export{V as OrgChart})。+esm 把全部 d3 子模块外置为嵌套 import(d3-selection@3/d3-array@3.2.4/d3-hierarchy@3.1.2/d3-zoom@3/d3-flextree@2.1.2 的 /npm/*/+esm)——运行时自解析,无需先载 d3 global。链式 new OrgChart().container(el).data(nodes).render()(README)。默认访问器源码核实(src/d3-org-chart.js L49-50):nodeId: d=>d.nodeId||d.id、parentNodeId: d=>d.parentNodeId||d.parentId,故扁平 {id,parentId} 开箱即用;根判定 parentNodeId(obj)==null(L687)。.container 源码注释 "either CSS style selector or DOM element"(L45),内部 select(attrs.container) 接受节点,故可直传 shadow 内元素。svgWidth 自动设为容器宽(L541),svgHeight 默认 window.innerHeight-100(L44)——boot 显式 .svgHeight(600) 固定。globalStyleInjection=no。globalDomMutation=conditional:+esm 命中 document.body.appendChild 仅在导出下载路径(createElement("a");v.download;body.appendChild;click),正常 render() 不触 body。globalEvents=no:d3-zoom 监听挂 svg,非 window。
